style.styleSentence: A glossy late-90s club track at 96 BPM featuring sparse syncopated drums with off-grid percussion clicks, a rubbery bassline, and bright chiptune/FM synth riffs that evoke classic blue-sky video game music, all anchored by smooth confident male vocals utilizing intimate spoken replies to create a stop-start rhythmic pocket.
style.vocalStyle: Smooth male lead with playful confidence mixed with intimate whispered ad-libs and staccato spoken interjections between sung phrases

sections.text:
Yeah
You asked me a question
I already had the answer
Listen

You been moving cautious
Like the room got eyes
Like the walls might talk
Like the night got spies
I see how you look
When the bassline drops
Half a smile on your face
Then you tell me stop
You got secrets in your rhythm
Little warnings in your tone
But I’m not here to run it
I’m here to bring it home

Iiii wooon’t let thiiis shooow
[Spoken] Won’t tell a soul, not anybody
Iiii knooow how thiiis goooes
[Spoken] Keep it locked, keep it quiet, nobody
If you let me close
[Spoken] I won’t make it public, no
If you let me know
[Spoken] I won’t tell nobody
I’m talking nobody

You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody
Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody
You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody
Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

That somebody
That somebody
I’ll be that somebody
Nobody, nobody
I won’t tell nobody

You asked if I’m steady
Girl, you know I don’t fold
I don’t move reckless
I don’t speak what I’m told
You can test my patience
You can check my pride
I’ll still keep your name
On the safer side
You don’t need a rumor
You don’t need a scene
You need somebody solid
When the lights go green
And if the world gets loud
I’ll turn the noise down low
Put your trust in my hands
And I won’t let it go

sections.raw: Pre-Chorus 2 - Direct response, sung then spoken
sections.text:
Youuu knooow I’m respooonsible
[Spoken] You ain’t gotta watch your back when I’m beside you
Youuu knooow I’m respooonsible
[Spoken] I don’t need the spotlight just to hide you
You’re not just anybody
[Spoken] That’s why I move different when I’m around you
You’re not just anybody
[Spoken] I saw that from the first time I found you

You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody
Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody
You al-rea-dy know
You said you need somebody
I said I’ll be that somebody
Say less, don’t say no
You don’t gotta need somebody
I’m right here, I’m that somebody

Sometimes you’re sweet, sweet
Sometimes you’re trouble, trouble
Sometimes you pull me close
Then act like I said too much though
I like it when you’re goody, goody
I love it when you’re naughty, naughty
Either way, you got me, got me
I’m not leaving this party, party
